scripts.dev:integrated: concurrently -n backend,cal-api,tm,calendar,journal -c cyan,blue,green,magenta,yellow "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:calendar-backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:calendar:frontend" "npm run dev:journal:frontend"
scripts.dev:calendar: concurrently -n cal-api,calendar -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:calendar-backend" "npm run dev:calendar:frontend"
scripts.dev:journal: concurrently -n api,journal -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:journal:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:calendar && npm run build:journal
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:desktop
